commands.title: Basic Subdomain Discovery
commands.description: Discovers subdomains using subfinder with recursive enumeration and saves results to a file.

commands.title: Live Subdomain Filtering
commands.description: Filters discovered subdomains using httpx and saves the alive ones to a file.

commands.title: Subdomain Takeover Check
commands.description: Checks for subdomain takeover vulnerabilities using subzy.

commands.title: Passive URL Collection
commands.description: Collects URLs from various sources and saves them to a file.

commands.title: Advanced URL Fetching
commands.description: Collects URLs from various sources and saves them to a file.
commands.command: echo example.com | katana -d 5 -ps -pss waybackarchive,commoncrawl,alienvault -f qurl | urldedupe >output.txtkatana -u https://example.com -d 5 | grep '=' | urldedupe | anew output.txtcat output.txt | sed 's/=.*/=/' >final.txt

commands.title: GAU URL Collection
commands.description: Collects URLs using GAU and saves them to a file.
commands.command: echo example.com | gau --mc 200 | urldedupe >urls.txtcat urls.txt | grep -E ".php|.asp|.aspx|.jspx|.jsp" | grep '=' | sort > output.txtcat output.txt | sed 's/=.*/=/' >final.txt

commands.title: Sensitive File Detection
commands.description: Detects sensitive files on the web server.

commands.title: Information Disclosure Dork
commands.description: Searches for information disclosure vulnerabilities using a dork.
commands.command: site:*.example.com (ext:doc OR ext:docx OR ext:odt OR ext:pdf OR ext:rtf OR ext:ppt OR ext:pptx OR ext:csv OR ext:xls OR ext:xlsx OR ext:txt OR ext:xml OR ext:json OR ext:zip OR ext:rar OR ext:md OR ext:log OR ext:bak OR ext:conf OR ext:sql)

commands.title: Git Repository Detection
commands.description: Detects Git repositories on the web server.
commands.command: cat example.coms.txt | grep "SUCCESS" | gf urls | httpx-toolkit -sc -server -cl -path "/.git/" -mc 200 -location -ms "Index of" -probe

commands.title: Information Disclosure Scanner
commands.description: Checks for information disclosure vulnerabilities using a scanner.

commands.title: AWS S3 Bucket Finder
commands.description: Searches for AWS S3 buckets associated with the target.

commands.title: API Key Finder
commands.description: Searches for exposed API keys and tokens in JavaScript files.
commands.command: cat allurls.txt | grep -E "\.js$" | httpx-toolkit -mc 200 -content-type | grep -E "application/javascript|text/javascript" | cut -d' ' -f1 | xargs -I% curl -s % | grep -E "(API_KEY|api_key|apikey|secret|token|password)"

commands.title: XSS Hunting Pipeline
commands.description: Collects XSS vulnerabilities using various tools and saves them to a file.
commands.command: echo https://example.com/ | gau | gf xss | uro | Gxss | kxss | tee xss_output.txt

commands.title: XSS with Dalfox
commands.description: Uses Dalfox to scan for XSS vulnerabilities.

commands.title: Stored XSS Finder
commands.description: Finds potential stored XSS vulnerabilities by scanning forms.
commands.command: cat urls.txt | grep -E "(login|signup|register|forgot|password|reset)" | httpx -silent | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/xss/ -severity critical,high

commands.title: DOM XSS Detection
commands.description: Detects potential DOM-based XSS vulnerabilities.
commands.command: cat js_files.txt | Gxss -c 100 | sort -u | dalfox pipe -o dom_xss_results.txt

commands.title: LFI Methodology
commands.description: Tests for Local File Inclusion (LFI) vulnerabilities using various methods.
commands.command: echo "https://example.com/" | gau | gf lfi | uro | sed 's/=.*/=/' | qsreplace "FUZZ" | sort -u | xargs -I{} ffuf -u {} -w payloads/lfi.txt -c -mr "root:(x|\*|\$[^\:]*):0:0:" -v

commands.title: Basic CORS Check
commands.description: Checks the Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) policy of a website.

commands.title: CORScanner
commands.description: Fast CORS misconfiguration scanner that helps identify potential CORS vulnerabilities.

commands.title: CORS Nuclei Scan
commands.description: Uses Nuclei to scan for CORS misconfigurations across multiple domains.
commands.command: cat example.coms.txt | httpx -silent | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/vulnerabilities/cors/ -o cors_results.txt

commands.title: CORS Origin Reflection Test
commands.description: Tests for origin reflection vulnerability in CORS configuration.

commands.title: Aggressive WordPress Scan
commands.description: Scans a WordPress website for vulnerabilities and saves the results to a file.
commands.command: wpscan --url https://example.com --disable-tls-checks --api-token YOUR_TOKEN -e at -e ap -e u --enumerate ap --plugins-detection aggressive --force

commands.title: Naabu Scan
commands.description: Scans for open ports and services using Naabu.

commands.title: Nmap Full Scan
commands.description: Performs a full port scan using Nmap.

commands.title: Masscan
commands.description: Scans for open ports and services using Masscan.

commands.title: Nmap — Web Port Scan
commands.description: Fast scan of common web and service ports on a target host.

commands.title: Nmap — HTTP Enumeration Scripts
commands.description: Run HTTP-specific NSE scripts for titles, headers, methods, and tech fingerprinting.

commands.title: Nmap — SSL/TLS Analysis
commands.description: Enumerate SSL ciphers, cert details, and known vulnerabilities on HTTPS.

commands.title: Gobuster — Directory Brute Force
commands.description: Discover hidden directories and files on a web server.

commands.title: Gobuster — Vhost Discovery
commands.description: Brute force virtual hosts to find subdomains/sites on the same IP.

commands.title: Gobuster — DNS Subdomain Enum
commands.description: Enumerate subdomains via DNS brute force.

commands.title: Nuclei — Single Target Scan
commands.description: Run all Nuclei templates against a single URL.

commands.title: Nuclei — Critical & High Only
commands.description: Scan a target filtering to critical and high severity findings only.

commands.title: Nuclei — Tagged Templates (CVE/Exposure)
commands.description: Run specific template tags — useful for focused CVE and misconfiguration hunts.

commands.title: Nuclei — Scan URL List
commands.description: Run Nuclei against a list of live URLs from recon output.
commands.command: cat alive-urls.txt | nuclei -t nuclei-templates/ -severity medium,high,critical -c 50 -o nuclei-results.txt

commands.title: Web Recon Pipeline
commands.description: Full web recon chain — port scan, probe live hosts, directory brute, then Nuclei.
commands.command: nmap -sV -p 80,443,8080,8443 example.com -oG - | awk '/Status: Open/{print $2}' | httpx -silent -o alive.txt && gobuster dir -u https://example.com -w /usr/share/wordlists/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt -q -o gobuster.txt && nuclei -l alive.txt -severity critical,high -o nuclei.txt

commands.title: Httpx → Nuclei Quick Sweep
commands.description: Probe subdomains for live web services then immediately scan with Nuclei.
commands.command: cat subexample.coms_alive.txt | httpx -silent -status-code -title -tech-detect -o alive.txt && nuclei -l alive.txt -severity critical,high,medium -c 40 -o nuclei-sweep.txt

commands.title: Arjun Passive
commands.description: Passively discovers parameters using Arjun.

commands.title: Arjun Wordlist
commands.description: Uses Arjun to discover parameters using a custom wordlist.

commands.title: JS File Hunting
commands.description: Collects JavaScript files from a website and analyzes them.

commands.title: JS File Analysis
commands.description: Analyzes collected JavaScript files.

commands.title: Content Type Check
commands.description: Checks the content type of URLs.
commands.command: echo example.com | gau | grep -Eo '(\/[^\/]+)\.(php|asp|aspx|jsp|jsf|cfm|pl|perl|cgi|htm|html)$' | httpx -status-code -mc 200 -content-type | grep -E 'text/html|application/xhtml+xml'

commands.title: JavaScript Content Check
commands.description: Checks for JavaScript content in URLs.
commands.command: echo example.com | gau | grep '\.js-php-jsp-other extens$' | httpx -status-code -mc 200 -content-type | grep 'application/javascript'

commands.title: SSL Certificate Search
commands.description: Searches for SSL certificates using Shodan.

commands.title: LFI with Request File
commands.description: Uses FFUF to bruteforce LFI vulnerabilities using a request file.

commands.title: XSS with Request File
commands.description: Uses FFUF to bruteforce XSS vulnerabilities using a request file.

commands.title: XSS/SSRF Header Testing
commands.description: Tests for XSS and SSRF vulnerabilities using various methods.
commands.command:
cat example.coms.txt | assetfinder --subs-only| httprobe | while read url; do xss1=$(curl -s -L $url -H 'X-Forwarded-For: xss.yourburpcollabrotor'|grep xss) xss2=$(curl -s -L $url -H 'X-Forwarded-Host: xss.yourburpcollabrotor'|grep xss) xss3=$(curl -s -L $url -H 'Host: xss.yourburpcollabrotor'|grep xss) xss4=$(curl -s -L $url --request-target http://burpcollaborator/ --max-time 2); echo -e "\e[1;32m$url\e[0m""
""Method[1] X-Forwarded-For: xss+ssrf => $xss1""
""Method[2] X-Forwarded-Host: xss+ssrf ==> $xss2""
""Method[3] Host: xss+ssrf ==> $xss3""
""Method[4] GET http://xss.yourburpcollabrotor HTTP/1.1 ""
";done
